---
title: "Ötztaler Radmarathon (unsupported)"
date: "2023-08-02"
description: "246 km mit 5412 Hm"
image: thumbnail.png

draft: false
categories: [Österreich, Granfondo]
strava_id: 9571491250
distance_km: 246.5
elevation_m: 5412
moving_time_min: 804

format: 
  html:
    toc: false

    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet/dist/leaflet.css"/>
        <script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet/dist/leaflet.js"></script>
        <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js"></script>

lightbox:
  match: auto
---


::: {.stats-grid-container}
::: {.stats-grid}

::: {.grid-item}
{{< bi arrow-right-circle class="param-icon">}}
<span class="stats-value">246.5</span>
<span class="stats-label">Kilometer</span>
:::

::: {.grid-item}
{{< bi arrow-up-right-circle class="param-icon">}}
<span class="stats-value">5412</span>
<span class="stats-label">Höhenmeter</span>
:::

::: {.grid-item}
{{< bi clock-history class="param-icon">}}
<span class="stats-value">13h 24min</span>
<span class="stats-label">Fahrzeit</span>
:::

::: {.grid-item}
{{< bi speedometer class="param-icon">}}
<span class="stats-value">18.4</span>
<span class="stats-label">km/h (74.5 max.)</span>
:::

::: {.grid-item}
{{< bi lightning class="param-icon">}}
<span class="stats-value">94.0</span>
<span class="stats-label">Watt (240 max.)</span>
:::

::: {.grid-item}
{{< bi heart-pulse class="param-icon">}}
<span class="stats-value">130.3</span>
<span class="stats-label">bpm (174.0 max.)</span>
:::

:::
:::


&nbsp;



&nbsp;



<div id="map" style="height: 400px;"></div>

<script>
fetch("track.json")
  .then(response => response.json())
  .then(data => {

    const latlngs = data.latlng.map(coord => [coord[0], coord[1]]);

    const map = L.map('map');
    const polyline = L.polyline(latlngs, { color: 'black', weight: 2 }).addTo(map); // <-- schwarz, dicke 3px

    map.fitBounds(polyline.getBounds());

    L.tileLayer('https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png', {
      attribution: '&copy; OpenStreetMap contributors'
    }).addTo(map);

  });
</script>




<div style="height: 250px; width: 100%; position: relative; margin-top: 20px;">
  <canvas id="elevationChart"></canvas>
</div>

<script>
fetch("track.json")
  .then(response => response.json())
  .then(data => {
    
    // 1. Rolling Mean (Moving Average, k=100)
    const k = 100;
    const half_k = Math.floor(k / 2);
    const smoothed_alt = data.altitude.map((val, i, arr) => {
      let start = Math.max(0, i - half_k);
      let end = Math.min(arr.length, i + half_k);
      let subset = arr.slice(start, end);
      let sum = subset.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);
      return sum / subset.length;
    });

    // 2. Y-Minimum berechnen und als VOLLE Zahl abrunden (Behebt Problem 1)
    const min_alt = Math.min(...data.altitude);
    const lim_y = Math.floor(min_alt * 0.9);

    // 3. Maximale Distanz ermitteln
    const maxDist = data.distance[data.distance.length - 1];

    // 4. Datenstruktur für lineare Achse umbauen (X/Y-Paare)
    const chartData = data.distance.map((dist, i) => ({
      x: dist,
      y: smoothed_alt[i]
    }));

    const ctx = document.getElementById('elevationChart').getContext('2d');
    new Chart(ctx, {
      type: 'line',
      data: {
        datasets: [{
          data: chartData,
          borderColor: 'black',
          borderWidth: 1.5,
          backgroundColor: 'rgba(204, 204, 204, 0.3)',
          fill: 'start',
          pointRadius: 0,
          pointHoverRadius: 5,
          tension: 0
        }]
      },
      options: {
        responsive: true,
        maintainAspectRatio: false,
        plugins: {
          legend: { display: false },
          tooltip: {
            displayColors: false,
            callbacks: {
              // Tooltip greift jetzt auf die numerischen Daten zu
              title: (items) => items[0].parsed.x.toFixed(1) + ' km',
              label: (item) => Math.round(item.parsed.y) + ' hm'
            }
          }
        },
        scales: {
          x: {
            type: 'linear',  // Behebt Problem 2b (gleichmäßige Abschnitte)
            position: 'bottom',
            min: 0,
            max: maxDist,
            title: { display: true, text: 'km', color: '#666' },
            grid: { display: false },
            ticks: {
              maxTicksLimit: 10,
              callback: function(value, index, values) {
                // Wenn es der letzte Wert (Ende der Tour) ist, zeige 1 Nachkommastelle
                if (value === maxDist) {
                  return value.toFixed(0);
                }
                // Sonst zeige absolut saubere, volle Kilometer-Schritte
                return Math.round(value);
              }
            },
            afterBuildTicks: function(scale) {
              // Behebt Problem 2a: Erzwingt das Ende der Tour als letzten Tick
              if (scale.ticks.length > 0) {
                let lastTick = scale.ticks[scale.ticks.length - 1].value;
                // Verhindert, dass der letzte automatische Tick zu nah am Ende klebt und überlappt
                if (maxDist - lastTick < (maxDist * 0.08)) {
                  scale.ticks.pop(); 
                }
              }
              scale.ticks.push({ value: maxDist });
            }
          },
          y: {
            min: lim_y,
            title: { display: true, text: 'Höhenmeter', color: '#666' },
            grid: { color: 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)' },
            ticks: {
              precision: 0 // Erzwingt zusätzlich nur volle Höhenmeter auf der Achse
            }
          }
        }
      }
    });
  });
</script>



::: {.gallery}

![](img/20230802_052036.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_061841.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_080748.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_093928.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_095723.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_101246.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_102009.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_103018.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_111449.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_111514.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_112458.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_112614.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_113056.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_113157.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_114039.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_121741.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_125906.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_132842.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_133718.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_134013.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_135358.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_142048.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_142112.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_142124.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_144507.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_150550.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_151558.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_151854.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_152121.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_152529.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_154416.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_155753.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_155757.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_155801.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_160759.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_161646.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_162500.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_170012.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_180712.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_183804.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_193629.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_194928.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_202413.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_202435.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_202812.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_203539.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_205232.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_205249.webp){group="tour"}

:::


&nbsp;
